description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a smooth, slightly matte surface and prominent black seams dividing the ball into eight curved panels. The ball is spherical and appears to be made of synthetic leather or rubber, with a subtle texture for grip. The seams are recessed and run symmetrically from pole to pole, creating the classic basketball look. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or signs of wear on the surface, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. The coloration is a uniform orange-brown, typical of regulation basketballs used in urban parks, gyms, or street courts. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the views provided.
description: A classic orange basketball with black recessed seams and a smooth, slightly matte surface. The ball is clean, unmarked, and features the standard eight-panel design.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with two wide black seams running vertically, dividing the visible surface into three main sections.
description_view_1: This view highlights the curvature of the seams, with the black lines appearing to arc more prominently across the ball's surface.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side shows the vertical seams but from the opposite direction, maintaining the symmetrical panel pattern.
description_view_3: The seams are again visible, with the curvature and spacing matching the standard basketball design, viewed from a slightly rotated angle.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with four wide, curved black seams intersecting at the poles and dividing the ball into symmetrical sections.
